scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --timestamp-format HH:mm:ss.SSS --prefix "{time} [{name}]" -n web,api -c cyan,red "bun run --cwd web dev" "uv run --directory backend/api uvicorn app.main:app --reload"
scripts.db:push: bun run --cwd web bunx drizzle-kit push
scripts.db:generate: bun run --cwd web bunx drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: bun run --cwd web bunx drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:studio: bun run --cwd web bunx drizzle-kit studio
